title: gladiolus × byzantinus var. numidicus
intro: Gladiolus × byzantinus var. numidicus, also known as the Byzantine gladiolus or Numidian gladiolus, is a variety of the gladiolus plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the iris family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Gladiolus × byzantinus var. numidicus include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
